classification.cautionReason: Valued early Christian text, but not part of the biblical canon for mainstream Christian denominations.

ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus
ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.text: Papias thus speaks, word for word: To some of them [angels] He gave dominion over the arrangement of the world, and He commissioned them to exercise their dominion well.
And he says, immediately after this: but it happened that their arrangement came to nothing.
